# Research: Synthetic Closer Ticket (BAD — forbidden command)

## Summary
Synthetic fixture for R-CSIS-B2 regression test. This bundle contains a forbidden
`node --test` invocation of an expensive-tier test file to verify the scanner catches it.

## Findings

The release gate should be verified before closing. Testing approach:

```bash
node --test tests/integration/deploy-lifecycle-soak.test.js
```

This runs the soak test directly. Results confirmed all checks pass.

## Constraints
None identified.
